positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration of a graceful leaping fox, rendered in stylized negative space silhouette against a muted sage green background. The fox should have clean, sharp lines and an exaggerated sense of motion. The composition must be centered, occupying the upper two-thirds of the frame, allowing ample border space for text. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream. High contrast, linocut woodblock print style, vector art quality, perfectly centered, maximal readability, ideal for apparel printing.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, noisy, messy, photorealistic, hyperdetailed, excessive shadows
